title: Figure 2.10 Convolution of x(t) and g(t).
summary: This page is a figure page illustrating the graphical convolution of x(t) and g(t). It shows the original signals, several overlap cases for different ranges of t, and the resulting output c(t) as a piecewise function plotted versus time.

figures.caption: Convolution of x(t) and g(t), including subplots (a) through (i)
